vllm.title: Kimi K2 Fused MoE kernels Optimization configs
vllm.author: samanamp
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Optimize Kimi K2 Fused MoE kernels Optimization configs
Execution improvement: We see 17.8% in Output token throughput (tok/s). The bulk of improvement is in Inter-token Latency.
Test Plan

Single benchmark

python benchmarks/kernels/benchmark_moe_old.py --model $MODEL --dtype "fp8_w8a8" --t

vllm.title: Enable --profile in 'vllm bench throughput'
vllm.author: tomasruizt
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The goal is easily profile a throughput workload. Concretely the command vllm bench throughput --profile ... will generate a profiling file, which is useful to debug performance gaps using the https://ui.perfetto.dev/ UI.
Test Plan
The vllm bench command can take 4 different paths. Here is h

vllm.title: [Core] feat: Add --safetensors-load-strategy flag for faster safetensors loading from Lustre
vllm.author: shengshiqi-google
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The default method for loading safetensors relies on lazy loading (mmap). While this is highly efficient for local storage (like SSDs), it causes severe performance degradation on network or distributed file systems (like Lustre or NFS). These file systems handle the small random reads requi

vllm.title: [torchao] Support quantization configs using module swap
vllm.author: jerryzh168
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Current torchao integration quantizes the weights by wrapping weights in a top level linear module and use quantize_ to quantize it, this works for quantization methods that do inplace changes to the weight itself, such as int4, float8, since these only do inplace changes to the linear modu
